name: Trained Killer
bootlegger_zh: 每个夜晚当恶魔击杀玩家时,会按照纸上从上到下的顺序. 镇长的能力也会按照顺序来触发.
如果有角色幸存,说书人可以决定他们是否再次成为目标.
bootlegger: Each night, demon will kill following top to bottom order on the script, so does mayor's ability.
If a character survives one night's kill, storyteller may make them the target again.
author: Ekin
